arts.ttl: Aston Villa intensify negotiations with Sevilla to sign Loïc Badé
arts.sum: According to Foot Mercato, Aston Villa have intensified negotiations with Sevilla to sign French centre-back Loïc Badé (24) in the January transfer. Unai Emery has identified the Frenchman as an ideal…

arts.ttl: Prince William 'uses secret name' to follow gossip on Aston Villa fan forums
arts.sum: Prince William is a huge Aston Villa fan, attending many of their games and he has even been a regular face at Villa's Bodymoor Heath training ground - having chats with boss Unai Emery

arts.ttl: Arsenal given ‘VERY LIKELY’ message over wonderkid Nypan
arts.sum: This ability to be decisive at such a young age has fuelled transfer interest in the player, with Arsenal and Manchester United among the clubs interested in Nypan. While Pimenta is currently sifting her way through potential destinations for the much-wanted player, interested parties have been given a warning that Nypan is unlikely to leave during the January window.

arts.ttl: ‘A risk’: Darren Bent says £50m striker would be a risky signing for Arsenal because of his attitude
arts.sum: Arsenal’s search for a striker is still ongoing. Arsenal have been looking for a striker for such a long time now. 12 months ago, Arsenal...

arts.ttl: 'All done': Villa feel they've now clinched second January signing and are ready to push for 'strong' third - Romano
arts.sum: Aston Villa were busy in the summer transfer window and are now being just as active in the January market. The Villans have already signed...

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal look like a Mourinho team - but must change to win like one
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal have been likened to a Jose Mourinho team this season - but how accurate are those comparisons and will it bring success?

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal could accelerate striker transfer plans after double injury blow
arts.sum: Injuries to Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus have left the Gunners light in attacking areas

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes feelings clear on battle of set-piece coaches ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Arsenal have come under fire recently after set-piece coach Nicolas Jover's increasingly active role on the touchline, but Aston Villa boss Unai Emery has no issue with the vocal presence of his own coach Austin MacPhee

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Newcastle set Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa, Wilfried Zaha to MLS
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Newcastle United's Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa and Wilfried Zaha to the MLS.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £96m midfielder to sign a new contract after holding talks with Arsenal and Man City recently
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala is ready to turn down the chance of a move back to England to stay with Bayern Munich, TBR Football can confirm. Bayern...
